meta.title: DEF CON 31 Trailer!
meta.description:
Many thanks to the mighty, mighty Zebbler for this DEF CON 31 Trailer video! Enjoy the artistry, dance like no one's watching and get your mind right for DEF CON 31. 

You can download it for yourself on the  media server at https://media.defcon.org/DEF%20CON%2031/.


Two little weeks, people. It's almost here. Let's GO!

Full video credits:

Produced by Zebbler Studios
Inspiration and story development by Zebbler, DayDreemer Visions, Matthew McCorkindale
3d worlds / animation by Arcane Realities
Ending 3d animation and modeling by Glass Crane
Additional 3d character development by DayDreemer and Nicholas Love
Video editing by Zebbler
Sound design by Encanti
Vocal samples and a/v creative direction by Zebbler
